message:
chore(deps): bump tokio, uuid, tempfile, which, proptest-derive, download-artifact

- tokio 1.49.0 → 1.50.0
- uuid 1.21.0 → 1.22.0
- tempfile 3.24.0 → 3.25.0 (both deps and dev-deps)
- which 8.0.0 → 8.0.1
- proptest-derive 0.7.0 → 0.8.0
- actions/download-artifact v4 → v8 (e2e.yml, release.yml)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -73,7 +73,7 @@ jobs:
           cache-on-failure: true
 
       - name: Download binary
-        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v8
         with:
           name: ms-binary
           path: bin
@@ -129,7 +129,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Download binary
-        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v8
         with:
           name: ms-binary
           path: bin

@@ -205,7 +205,7 @@ jobs:
           fetch-depth: 0
 
       - name: Download all artifacts
-        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v8
         with:
           path: artifacts
